name: RPlog_On_Ord_Mantell
title: On Ord Mantell
summary: This is an arc index chronicling the story of the former Imperial Naval Captain Lynae Cassius during her time on Ord Mantell. After the battle of Nar Shaddaa, Lynae rescues the gravely wounded Jedi Brandis Finian and brings him to safety, beginning a chapter of uncertain future among old colleagues. The page gathers and links the connected scenes -- from her unspectacular arrival and tense cantina conversations to fateful choices, a bureaucratic reckoning with Luke's help, and the arrival of old friends -- that together trace Lynae's journey before she returns, as ever a soldier, to her work.
